name: join_forex_groups
description: Week 1 warm-up: join target groups. Enable manually after review.

name: create_main_channel
description: Run ONCE to create your broadcast channel.
title: ForexEdge Trading Tools
about: Daily trading tips, EA updates & exclusive signals. Tools at https://yourstore.com

name: create_community_group
description: Run ONCE to create your community supergroup.
title: ForexEdge Community
about: Traders helping traders. EA reviews, setups & tips. Store: https://yourstore.com

name: daily_channel_posts
description: Week 2+: post AI content to owned channels every 6h.

name: engagement_poll
question: Which platform are you mainly trading on?

name: broadcast_pitch
description: Broadcast to joined groups. Enable only after 2+ weeks warm-up.
message: Running a promo this week — ForexEdge EAs from $20. XAUUSD, Boom & Crash, Prop Firm-ready. https://yourstore.com

name: dm_campaign_xauusd
description: Week 3+: DM high-value targets from XAUUSD groups. Start with limit=10.

name: growth_loop_main
description: Full growth loop — scrape → DM → invite to own channel. Run weekly.

name: follow_up_warm_leads
description: DM users who showed warm signals in group chats (looking to buy, asking for EAs).
note: Review group_engagements table first to validate targets before enabling.

name: leave_stale_groups
description: Auto-leave groups with no activity in 7 days. Safe to keep enabled.
